title: 阪神大賞典の後に・重なりゆく大波

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Like this? Yeah... Yeah! I get it now! So what if it's
longer? This race is in the bag!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Just gotta keep my breathin' steady till the end...
then finish with a bang!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Yup, I've got it down pat. No way am I forgettin'
this pace now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as planned, Tamamo Cross nails her
technique in the run-up to the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But y'know what, Trainer? Sure is nice seein' your
goals comin' into view.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've been runnin' in the Twinkle Series for a
while now, yeah? And sure, I got me some wins...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But what I want is a win I can brag to my family
about! Somethin' that screams "BIG deal!"

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And the spring Tenno Sho's a race my dad's
always wanted to see me in...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I think we got a real shot now, don't we?! C'mon,
let's do my family proud!
choice_data_list: Yeah! We're off to the spring Tenno Sho!
Yeah! We're off to the spring Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah! I'm gettin' shivers here! We're finally
doin' it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: C'mon, Trainer, we gotta get that shield for my dad. Until then, we go hard at trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And we're not the only ones experiencing a
building wave of hype.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Oguri Cap wins her second graded race in a
row!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
A grueling comeback from the rear! Right when it
looked like her legs were about to give out, she
stormed her way to victory! 2,000 meters of turf
and still no trouble!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay, now I just have to keep this up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Spirits and tensions are high in the racing world.
The senior runners are abuzz prepping for the
Tenno Sho, and the classic runners eagerly await
both the Triple Crown and the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And at the same time, Oguri Cap, a rising star
from the regionals, is picking up momentum for
her third wave...
